name: minimal-app
description: Minimal Fabric Apps data layer with Rayfin auth and DAX query support.

scripts.build: node node_modules/@microsoft/fabric-app-data-cli/dist/index.js generate -o src/fabric.generated.ts && tsc -b --noCheck && vite build
scripts.build:fabric: node node_modules/@microsoft/fabric-app-data-cli/dist/index.js generate -o src/fabric.generated.ts && tsc -b --noCheck && vite build
